name: Git Cleanup
description: Clean up merged branches, stale remotes, and large files

input.command: echo 'Merged branches (can delete):'; git branch --merged main 2>/dev/null | grep -v 'main\|master\|\*' || echo 'None'
echo 'Stale remote branches:'; git remote prune origin --dry-run 2>/dev/null || echo 'None'
echo 'Largest tracked files:'; git ls-files | xargs ls -la 2>/dev/null | sort -k5 -n -r | head -10
